final:
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    output reg q
);always @(*) begin
    if (a == 0 && b == 0) begin
        q = 0;
    end else if (a == 0) begin
        q = b;
    end else begin
        q = a;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~a & ~b; q <= b & ~a; q <= a;
    end
  end

endmodule
